headline: Here's Why ConocoPhillips (COP) Is a Great 'Buy the Bottom' Stock Now
summary: ConocoPhillips (COP) appears to have found support after losing some value lately, as indicated by the formation of a hammer chart. In addition to this technical chart pattern, strong agreement among Wall Street analysts in revising earnings estimates higher enhances the stock's potential for a turnaround in the near term.
